name: Marine Sediment Chemical Composition at Station M186_50-1GC
description: Dataset containing chemical analysis of marine sediment samples collected at a single station (M186_50-1GC) on 2022-12-15. Includes measurements of various ions (e.g., nitrate, phosphate, sulfate), metals (e.g., iron, manganese, calcium), and other elements, along with geospatial and sampling metadata.
